_comment: Copy to config.json and fill in your battery MACs (see README: 'Find your batteries'). The advertised name is usually the battery serial; use it to match each MAC to a physical pack.
_device_defaults_comment: manufacturer/model shown on the HA device page. Applied to every pack unless a battery overrides 'manufacturer'/'model' itself. The pack serial is appended to model automatically. Whole section is optional.
_emulator_comment: OPTIONAL closed-loop (Goal 3). Used ONLY by pylon_emulator.py, never by the bridge. The emulator presents all packs as ONE virtual Pylontech battery to a Sungold/SRNE inverter set to BMS protocol PYL. *** SET EVERY VOLTAGE/CURRENT/TEMP BELOW TO YOUR OWN BATTERY DATASHEET. *** Values here are the tested Vatrer 51.2V 100Ah numbers and are intentionally conservative. 'listen_only': true is a safe dry-run (logs what it WOULD send, transmits nothing) — keep it true until you have read docs/CLOSED-LOOP.md and verified wiring. Omit this whole section if you only want monitoring.
